fields.change_message:
[{"added": {}}, {"added": {"name": "dashboard query", "object": "-- Dashboard Overview - Content Summary
SELECT 
    'Hero Section' as content_type,
    COUNT(*) as count,
    'Single record' as details
FROM website_hero_section
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'About Sections',
    COUNT(*),
    GROUP_CONCAT(section_type, ', ')
FROM website_about_section
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Core Services',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_core_service
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'FAQs',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_faq
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Carousel Slides',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_carousel_slide
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Partner Banks',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_partner_bank
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Mobile Operators',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_mobile_operator
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Transfer Partners',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_transfer_partner
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Branches',
    COUNT(*),
    'Main: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_main THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ', Coming Soon: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_coming_soon THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
FROM website_branch
ORDER BY content_type;"}}]

fields.tagline_en: Trusted Banking & Mobile Money Agent · Est. 2022
fields.tagline_sw: Wakala wa Benki na Pesa kwa Simu · Ilianzishwa 2022
fields.heading_en: Your Trusted Mobile Money & Banking Agent
fields.heading_sw: Wakala Wako wa Pesa kwa Simu na Benki Anayeaminika
fields.subheading_en: Fast, secure & reliable financial services in Dodoma. Banking, mobile money & international money transfers under one roof.
fields.subheading_sw: Huduma za kifedha za haraka, salama na za kuaminika Dodoma. Benki, pesa kwa simu na uhamisho wa fedha kimataifa chini ya paa moja.

fields.notice_en: WhatsApp/SMS/Voice calls accepted during working hours only
fields.notice_sw: WhatsApp/SMS/Simu hupokelewa wakati wa saa za kazi tu

fields.content_en: To be the most trusted and accessible financial services provider in Dodoma region, bridging the gap between traditional banking and mobile money..
fields.content_sw: Kuwa mtoa huduma wa kifedha anayeaminika na anayepatikana kwa urahisi katika mkoa wa Dodoma, kuunganisha benki za jadi na pesa kwa simu.

fields.content_en: To provide fast, reliable, and secure financial services to our community through innovative solutions and exceptional customer service.
fields.content_sw: Kutoa huduma za kifedha za haraka, za kuaminika na salama kwa jamii yetu kupitia suluhisho bunifu na huduma bora kwa wateja.

fields.content_en: Trust, Integrity, Accessibility, Innovation, and Customer-Centric Service in everything we do.
fields.content_sw: Uaminifu, Uadilifu, Upatikanaji, Ubunifu, na Huduma inayomlenga Mteja katika kila tunachofanya.

fields.description_en: CRDB, NMB, NBC, Equity, TCB, Akiba, Mkombozi, Amana, Mwanga Hakika, Mwalimu & more
fields.description_sw: CRDB, NMB, NBC, Equity, TCB, Akiba, Mkombozi, Amana, Mwanga Hakika, Mwalimu na wengine

fields.description_sw: Airtel, M-Pesa, Mixx by Yas, Halo Pesa, T-Pesa, Selcom

fields.description_en: Western Union · MoneyGram Send & receive worldwide
fields.description_sw: Western Union · MoneyGram Tuma na pokea duniani

fields.address_en: Morogoro Road/Nzuguni Street, Nzuguni Area, Dodoma
fields.address_sw: Morogoro Road/Nzuguni Street, Nzuguni Area, Dodoma

fields.street_address_en: Morogoro Road / Nzuguni Street, Nzuguni Area, Dodoma, Tanzania
fields.street_address_sw: Morogoro Road / Nzuguni Street, Nzuguni Area, Dodoma, Tanzania
fields.landmark_en: Located in the heart of Nzuguni Area, easily accessible from Morogoro Road. Look for Victoria Complex Building.
fields.landmark_sw: Iko katikati ya Nzuguni, inapatikana kwa urahisi kutoka Morogoro Road. Tafuta Jengo la Victoria Complex.

fields.description_en: CRDB, NMB, NBC, Equity, TCB, Azania, PBZ, Exim, BOA, Stanbic, Absa, UBA, Access, DTB, Mwalimu, Akiba, Mkombozi, Amana, Mwanga Hakika
fields.description_sw: CRDB, NMB, NBC, Equity, TCB, Azania, PBZ, Exim, BOA, Stanbic, Absa, UBA, Access, DTB, Mwalimu, Akiba, Mkombozi, Amana, Mwanga Hakika

fields.description_en: Airtel Money, M-Pesa, Mixx by Yas, Halo Pesa, T-Pesa, Selcom
fields.description_sw: Airtel Money, M-Pesa, Mixx by Yas, Halo Pesa, T-Pesa, Selcom

fields.description_en: Western Union & MoneyGram - Send and receive worldwide
fields.description_sw: Western Union na MoneyGram - Tuma na pokea duniani

fields.question_sw: Saa zenu za kazi ni zipi?
fields.answer_en: We are open Monday to Saturday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, and Sunday from 8:30 AM to 8:00 PM. Our phone lines are available during working hours only.
fields.answer_sw: Tunafunguliwa Jumatatu hadi Jumamosi 8:00 asubuhi hadi 8:00 jioni, na Jumapili 8:30 hadi 8:00 jioni. Simu zetu zinapatikana wakati wa saa za kazi tu.

fields.question_en: Can I send money internationally through Western Union?
fields.question_sw: Naweza kutuma pesa kimataifa kupitia Western Union?
fields.answer_en: Currently, customers can only receive money internationally. We are in the final stages of being allowed to send money internationally. Soon we will offer both sending and receiving services.
fields.answer_sw: Kwa sasa, wateja wanaweza kupokea tu pesa kutoka nje. Tuko katika hatua za mwishzo za kuruhusiwa kutuma pesa kimataifa. Hivi karibuni tutatoa huduma zote za kutuma na kupokea.

fields.question_en: Where exactly are you located in Dodoma?
fields.answer_en: We are located at Victoria Complex Building, along Morogoro Road/Nzuguni Street in Nzuguni Area, Dodoma. Our P.O. Box is 4236 Dodoma.
fields.answer_sw: Tupo Jengo la Victoria Complex, kando ya Morogoro Road/Nzuguni Street katika eneo la Nzuguni, Dodoma. S. L. P ni 4236 Dodoma.

fields.question_en: How can I submit a complaint?
fields.answer_en: You can submit complaints via email to agtarimo@gmail.com or call/SMS/WhatsApp +255788775282 during working hours.
fields.answer_sw: Unaweza kuwasilisha malalamiko kwa barua pepe agtarimo@gmail.com au kupiga simu/SMS/WhatsApp +255788775282 wakati wa saa za kazi.

fields.registration_sw: Imejiandikisha 17 Mei 2022 · S. L. P 4236 Dodoma
fields.address_en: Victoria Complex Building, Morogoro Road/Nzuguni Street, Nzuguni Area, Dodoma
fields.address_sw: Jengo la Victoria Complex, Morogoro Road/Nzuguni Street, Nzuguni Area, Dodoma

fields.title_en: YOUR TRUSTED BANKING & MOBILE MONEY AGENT
fields.title_sw: WAKALA WAKO WA BENKI NA PESA KWA SIMU
fields.description_en: Banking, mobile money and international money transfers – Nzuguni, Dodoma
fields.description_sw: Huduma za kibenki, mitandao ya simu na uhamisho wa fedha kimataifa – Nzuguni, Dodoma

fields.sql:
-- Dashboard Overview - Content Summary
SELECT 
    'Hero Section' as content_type,
    COUNT(*) as count,
    'Single record' as details
FROM website_hero_section
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'About Sections',
    COUNT(*),
    GROUP_CONCAT(section_type, ', ')
FROM website_about_section
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Core Services',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_core_service
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'FAQs',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_faq
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Carousel Slides',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_carousel_slide
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Partner Banks',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_partner_bank
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Mobile Operators',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_mobile_operator
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Transfer Partners',
    COUNT(*),
    'Active: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_active THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ' of ' || COUNT(*)
FROM website_transfer_partner
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Branches',
    COUNT(*),
    'Main: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_main THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) || ', Coming Soon: ' || SUM(CASE WHEN is_coming_soon THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
FROM website_branch
ORDER BY content_type;
